title: aegialina
intro: Aegialina, also known as Shepherd's Purse, is a flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anticoagulant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aegialina include its ability to aid in blood clotting, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Aegialina can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
